state: in-memory per-session ledger with static source inventory, runtime event accounting, and report artifacts
notes: Phase 04 static inventory slice: before_agent_start records redacted hashes/counts for system prompt options, context files, tools, and loaded package skills without broad command-time scans.
Phase 05 runtime ledger slice: input/message/tool/compaction handlers record bounded redacted size metadata and file/artifact interactions during normal work.
Phase 06 report command slice: /pi-context renders the maintained ledger snapshot and writes markdown/JSON report artifacts without scanning full session history.
Phase 07 UI integration slice: app-level HUD adapter exposes bounded redacted totals/contributors for pi-hud without coupling domain logic to HUD rendering.
